title.en: As a result, he will not be exposed for a short...

content.en:
The news that Ye Tian found out from the bone general was that the bone soldier was in retreat to heal his injuries, so he should not come out in a short period of time, and he would not go on a mission.

As a result, he will not be exposed for a short time.

In the following days, Ye Tian hid here, secretly spying on the news.

The bone soldiers and bone generals usually chat, they don't think that any ancestor can sneak here, so they don't care about it at all, and they will talk about everything.

Gradually, Ye Tian learned about some of the situation.

Among them, Ye Tian heard the most word - door!

These bone clans came to this forbidden land of the bone sea from the door, the forbidden land of the bone sea is very large, and occasionally some bone mountain treasure lands will be born, and each bone mountain treasure land will give birth to some resources that are very precious to the bone clan.

Therefore, the Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones is a treasure land for the Bone Clan, so they will stay here, and from time to time they will encounter precious resources.

Moreover, whoever discovers a precious resource belongs to whoever it is, and even the Bone Kings cannot occupy their treasures.

Of course.

Every Bone Clan can leave here at any time, and there will be a new Bone Clan to replace them.

It can be seen that there are many ancestor-level bone clans, and the number is beyond Ye Tian's imagination.

With so many bone clans, if all of them appeared in the Dark Forbidden Domain, the major forces would not be able to stop them, and they would be destroyed in an instant.

"How can the Bone Sea Forbidden Land be so powerful, and the Bone Sea Forbidden Land is not even one of the six major forbidden lands!"

Ye Tian really realized the horror of the forbidden land at this moment.

It's no wonder that when the Realm Ancestor mentioned the forbidden land, he was terrified and persuaded him not to go in, even if he had a special clone.

Other than that.

He also learned that the currency of the Bone Clan was the Bone Stone.

Bone stones are divided into many levels, and the bone stones used by these ancestral bone soldiers are ancestral bone stones, which can restore their combat consumption and can also slowly increase their cultivation, so they are used as currency.

However, Ye Tian doesn't have any bone coins at the moment.

Soon after, Ye Tian left this Bone Mountain, came to the periphery of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, found a deserted Bone Mountain, and retreated and cultivated in it.

Ye Tian's current strength is very limited, after all, he is copying bone soldiers, not bone generals.

He also wants to replicate the bone general, but the bone general's strength is scarce, and once the bone general is copied, the risk of exposure is too great.

The risk of exposure is smaller, but the strength is too weak, and trying to kill other Skeleton soldiers is not very obvious.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian wanted to let this bone soldier's body control the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, he would have already been able to control the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, so although it was a little difficult to change his body and control the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, it was not impossible.

Time passed slowly, and in a flash, hundreds of millions of years passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's bone soldier body had already mastered several Ultimate Ancestor Techniques, and his strength had reached the Elite Ancestor combat power.

But even so, Ye Tian wanted to kill a bone soldier in an instant, but he couldn't do it.

Moreover, once you fight, it will inevitably attract the attention of other bone clans, and you can't hide it at all.

Ye Tian's current idea is to obtain enough bone beads or other resources that will be of great help to him, so that his strength can reach a terrifying level, and he no longer needs to go through this sneaky way.

When the time comes, he will sweep the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones with absolute strength, kill a large number of bone soldiers, and obtain bone beads.

"Keep waiting, wait for a bone mountain to be born, and when the time comes, my strength will be enough to snatch enough treasures to exchange for ancestral bone stones, and then buy resources that are useful to me, and then leave the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

In a flash, billions of years have passed.

this day.

A mountain of bones was finally born.

Suddenly, many bone soldiers and some bone generals rushed to this bone mountain.

Ye Tian naturally rushed over as soon as possible.

At the same time, he was also paying attention to the bone soldier who was the same as his duplicate body, and only when he saw that the other party was not there, he dared to take the lead.

Obviously, the bone soldier was not lightly injured and is still healing.

Nameless Bone Mountain.

A Bone Soldier rushed in and began to search for resources.

Abrupt.

A large number of blood-colored flowers appeared in a bone mountain valley, and many bone soldiers fought for it.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian made a move.

He used the Ultimate Ancestral Technique of Hegemony and the Ultimate Ancestral Technique of Streamer, one of which made his speed reach the level of terrifying, and the other made his strength reach the level of fear, and it was very suitable for the bone clan.

Thundered!!!!

A venerable bone soldier was blasted away by Ye Tian, and he was the first to rush into the valley and capture these blood-colored flowers.

These bone soldiers were stunned, they didn't know why Ye Tian had become so powerful, except that his physical body had not transformed, his strength had already reached the combat power of the bone generals!

These bone soldiers were confused, but he was not confused, but continued to grab resources at a very fast speed.

It didn't take long for the resources on this bone mountain to be snatched up by these bone soldiers and bone generals.

And Ye Tian relied on his terrifying speed and strong strength to snatch many treasures.

Ye Tian didn't know these treasures, and he didn't want to know the function of these treasures.

He only knew that there was not much time left for him, and he would definitely be suspected if he suddenly broke out with such terrifying strength, and perhaps soon, his identity would be revealed.

Therefore, he had to sell these treasure resources to those shops of the bone clan as soon as possible, and then buy the resources he needed.

Not all of the Bone Clan's resources have a great effect on him, and some of them overlap with the resources of the Dark Forbidden Domain, so the effect is not good.

At the moment, he only knew that the bone beads were of great help to the ancestors.

Moreover, although the bone beads are not very helpful to the bone ancestor, they are also somewhat useful.

......

Bone Mountain, the core of the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones, a shop.

When Ye Tian came here, he immediately took out his treasures and said, "Sell all these things, how many ancestral bone stones can you produce?"

Ye Tian asked.

The shopkeeper weighed it and estimated: "300,000 ancestral bone stones, do you want to sell them?"

"Sell!"

Ye Tianying said.

Immediately, Ye Tian said again: "Do you have bone beads here?"

"What, you want bone beads?"

The shopkeeper's expression changed.

Ancestor-level bone soldiers, bone generals, and bone kings all have bone beads, which are the source of bone beads, and the bone clan is forbidden to fight each other in the forbidden land of the sea of bones, so it is simply unrealistic to want to obtain bone beads in the forbidden land of the sea of bones.

If you want bone beads, you can only buy them from other places.

And bone beads are a very taboo treasure, and no one dares to sell them publicly.

However, there are definitely people who sell bone beads in private.

It's just that bone beads are not of high value to the bone clan, but they are of high value to other races, so some bone clans will buy them privately and sell them to other races at a high price.

But what did Ye Tian buy the bone beads for, and there were no other races here.

"Just ask if you want to sell or not, I'm willing to buy it at a high price!"

Ye Tian asked.

"Sell, but there are not many bone beads in my shop, only five, if you want, I will give you 10,000 ancestral bone stones!"

The shopkeeper said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian bought five ancestral bone stones.

Subsequently, he took the remaining 250,000 ancestral bone stones and went to other shops to inquire, and finally only purchased thirteen bone beads, plus these five bone beads, that is, eighteen bone beads.

Eighteen bone beads plus 120,000 ancestral bone stones, this is Ye Tian's current harvest.

"I have to leave, those shops are afraid that they are suspicious, although they sold me bone beads, it is estimated that they will also investigate me, once investigated, I will definitely be exposed. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he immediately left here and headed for the edge of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

Soon, he came to the edge of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, and Ye Tian's body was already waiting outside.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's body stepped into the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones, and took away all the eighteen bone beads and 120,000 ancestral bone stones brought by the copied body.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian smashed the replica body that couldn't resist with a punch and wiped it out.

When the replica body is shattered, it will dissipate, and there will be no bone beads at all.

"Sure enough, there are no bone beads!"

Ye Tian sighed.

This was his experiment, in fact, he had known for a long time that there could be no bone beads this time, and the replicating body seemed to be the same as the main body, but once it died, it would dissipate, so it was impossible to give birth to bone beads.

Otherwise, he copied his body again and again, constantly giving birth to bone beads, where else did he need to steal the bone beads of the bone clan.

But nothing so good happens in the world!

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian left the Bone Sea Forbidden Land in an instant, and a Venerable Bone King of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land appeared here, a step slower.

"What's the matter, that Ancestor's breath? hasn't he fallen?"

The Bone Kings wondered.

Last time, one of Ye Tian's hands crossed over and quickly disappeared, they thought it was an illusion, but this time it was definitely not an illusion.

The ancestor who had been besieged by them reappeared.

"Maybe it's a special clone!"

The Bone Kings speculated.

But soon, the bone kings were furious.

It's just that the bone soldier who was just bombarded and killed has not really fallen, and he is still in retreat and healing in the forbidden place of the sea of bones.

What happened to the bone soldier who had just been killed?

Soon, the bone kings investigated it.

A fake bone soldier infiltrated the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones, turned into a bone soldier, and bought many bone beads, but they didn't even find it.

Suddenly, the bone kings were furious and began to order an investigation, and such a thing would never be allowed to happen again.
